title: Senior Staff Engineer, AI
description:
Location: Prefer Onsite NYC or SF. Open to exceptional
Remote candidates Employment Type: Full-Time Hiring Manager:
Andrew Rosen, Head of Engineering

About Arc

Arc is building the first AI-native business cash management
platform. We empower high-growth companies to manage,
analyze, and act on their financial data through a unified
cash management, treasury, and debt-financing
platform—powered by AI.

Founded in 2021, Arc is backed by world-class investors
(Series A), supports thousands of technology companies as
customers, and manages billions of dollars in transaction
volume. With offices in NYC and SF, we operate on a
Monday–Wednesday in-office model (Thu–Fri optional in-office
or WFH).

We’re at an inflection point.

Large enough to matter; small enough to innovate.

The Role

We are seeking a Senior Staff Engineer, AI to join Arc’s
engineering organization as a key technical leader. This is
a foundational AI role, responsible for driving the research
direction, execution, and delivery of Arc’s AI-powered
products across both cash management and debt marketplace
products.

What You’ll DoLeadership & Strategy

- Drive Arc’s most critical AI initiatives end-to-end in a
  cross-functional environment.
- Serve as a company-wide thought leader on foundational
  models, LLMs, agent systems, retrieval, and emerging
  research.
- Establish and refine Arc’s internal AI strategy, research
  direction, and technology roadmap.

Execution & Product Impact

- Collaborate with engineering, product, design, and
  leadership to build and improve AI-powered financial
  products.
- Build evaluation frameworks, model-improvement
  infrastructure, and production-grade AI systems.
- Rapidly prototype 0→1 and MVP experiences to unlock new
  value for Arc customers.
- Ship projects frequently and consistently, with strong bias
  to action.

Technical Excellence

- Architect and implement Generative AI applications using:
  - Agentic workflows
  - RAG systems
  - State-of-the-art model leveraging techniques
- Optimize for inference performance, token efficiency,
  latency, and cost.
- Contribute to platform-level systems in Python and
  Typescript.

What You BringMinimum Qualifications

- 8+ years of engineering experience, including 1+ years
  building AI-based applications.
- Advanced degree in Computer Science or related field;
  Masters/PhD preferred
- Strong background in Generative AI, LLMs, and modern applied
  AI toolchains.
- Demonstrated success building agentic systems, RAG
  architectures, or state-of-the-art model integrations.
- Experience building evaluation pipelines for foundational-
  model applications.
- Strong software engineering fundamentals.
- Proven ability to independently drive 0→1, MVP development,
  and rapid prototyping.

Preferred Experience

- Startup experience, ideally combined with exposure to 1–2
  mid-size or large organizations.
- Fintech or B2B product experience.
- Applied AI experience including infra, model improvement
  loops, and optimization.
- Python, Typescript, model performance tuning, and workflow
  automation.

Why Join Arc Now?

- Category creation: You’ll build the first AI platform for
  business cash business management.
- Massive market: Banking + treasury + AI automation is a
  multi-trillion-dollar opportunity.
- PMF already secured: Arc has elite customers, strong
  economics, and hyper-growth.
- High impact: Staff engineers here are foundational—this role
  moves the roadmap.
- Lean, elite team: Work with exceptional builders; every
  engineer is high-leverage.

Financial data analysis and action through AI automation
AI-native business cash management with automated insights
ai_classification_reasoning:
This is a hands-on AI engineering role responsible for
building and deploying Generative AI applications including
agentic workflows, RAG systems, and model integrations. The
role involves direct work with LLMs, inference optimization,
and production-grade AI systems rather than just support
infrastructure.
